speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke liye rishte dekh rahe hain
text: Dadi ki seva ke chakkar mein main ja nahi payi aur ab ghar wale mere liye rishte dekh rahe hain. Main unhe apni sacchai bata kar unki 'izzat' mitti mein nahi mila sakti, isliye chup-chap unki pasand ke ladke se milne ko taiyaar hoon. Parivaar ki shaan bani rahe, bas isiliye main apni asli pehchaan ko andar hi maar rahi hoon taaki 'log kya kahenge' wala darr unhe na sataye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational conflict between family honor and personal truth.
text: Ghar ki izzat bachane ke liye aapne faisla kiya hai ki aap unki pasand ke rishte dekhne ko taiyaar hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke liye rishte dekh rahe hain
text: Haan, kyunki agar maine sach bola toh parivaar ki shaan khatam ho jayegi. Wo log toh bas yehi chahte hain ki unke liye rishte dekh rahe hain aur main bas haan bol doon. Par andar hi andar itna bojh lag raha hai jaise koi mera gala ghont raha ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of family honor being destroyed.
text: Aapko lagta hai ki agar sacchai bahar aayi toh parivaar ki shaan mitti mein mil jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke liye rishte dekh rahe hain
text: Bilkul. Papa ne humesha mujhe sar utha kar jeena sikhaya, par ab lagta hai ki meri wajha se unka sar jhuk jayega. Isliye main bas unki khushi dekh rahi hoon. Par ye darr ki log kya kahenge mujhse bardaasht nahi ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to stigma cue with a shorter restatement using Lens D about duration of suppression.
text: Papa ki izzat ke liye aap kafi waqt se ye darr akele seh rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke liye rishte dekh rahe hain
text: Kaafi waqt se. Partner ki shaadi ho gayi, main dadi ki seva mein thi toh unhe rok bhi nahi payi. Ab toh rasta hi band lagta hai. Unke liye rishte dekh rahe hain aur har Sunday koi naya ladka photo bhejta hai. Main bas smile karti hoon par andar se ro rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Questioning to understand the depth of her silence in this relational preservation.
text: Jab aap un photos ko dekh kar smile karti hain, toh kya unhe zara bhi andaza hota hai ki aapke dil mein kya chal raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke liye rishte dekh rahe hain
text: Nahi, bilkul nahi. Main itni achi acting karti hoon ki Mummy ko lagta hai main settle hona chahti hoon. Par mujhe darr lagta hai ki kisi anjaan se shaadi karke main uski life bhi kharab kar dungi. Parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye kitne jhoot bolne padenge?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the complex relational burden of protecting others through lies.
text: Aapko lag raha hai ki ghar ki shaan ki raksha karne ke liye aapko har rishte mein jhoot ka sahara lena pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke liye rishte dekh rahe hain
text: Ji, aur ye jhoot mujhe khaa raha hai. Wo log mere liye rishte dekh rahe hain itni khushi se, aur main unhe dhoka de rahi hoon. Par agar sach bol diya toh Mummy toh bardaasht hi nahi kar payengi. Unhe lagega unki beti ne unhe dhoka diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the fear of the mother feeling betrayed.
text: Mummy ke toot jaane ka darr aapko har bar sach bolne se rok leta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke liye rishte dekh rahe hain
text: Wahi baat hai. Unka bharosa mere liye sab kuch hai. Par apni pehchaan ko maarna itna aasaan nahi hai. Jab wo rishte dekh rahe hain, mujhe lagta hai meri life koi aur likh raha hai aur main bas ek katputli hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the unexpressed feeling of ISOLATION common in C6 + Relational Preservation.
text: Lagta hai aap is ISOLATION mein bilkul akeli pad gayi hain, jahan itne logon ke beech hote hue bhi koi aapki asliyat nahi dekh pa raha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke liye rishte dekh rahe hain
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Sabse zyada dukh isi baat ka hai ki koi nahi jaanta. Partner bhi chali gayi, ab toh bas main aur ye khamoshi bachi hai. Wo mere liye rishte dekh rahe hain, par unhe ye nahi pata ki main andar se pehle hi khatam ho chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the feeling of being torn between identity and family as a common cultural reality.
text: Apni pehchaan aur parivaar ke samman ke beech pisna ek bahut bada bojh hai jo aap utha rahi hain. Humare samaj mein izzat ka darr aksar apno se hi door kar deta hai, isme aapki galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya ye bolne ke liye. Mujhe hamesha lagta tha main hi galat hoon. Par ab kya? Main kab tak aise bhagti rahungi? Ab toh baat milne tak pahunch gayi hai. Koi rasta hi nahi dikhta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a systemic anecdote about identity vs family pressure to build rapport.
text: LGBTQ youth mein ye khamoshi bahut common hai — sirf tumhara struggle nahi hai, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki biradari ka darr sabke dilon mein hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke liye rishte dekh rahe hain
text: Sach mein. Par main kab tak biradari se darti rahungi? Ab toh kuch karna hi hoga. Unke liye rishte dekh rahe hain aur agle hafte ek family aa rahi hai. Batao main ab kya karoon? Mujhe koi rasta dikhao.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering culturally safe steps to delay or navigate the immediate pressure.
text: Aap ye kar sakti hain: Pehla, abhi shaadi se mana karne ke liye 'higher studies' ya 'career' ka bahana banayein taaki thoda waqt mile. Doosra, kisi aise dost se baat karein jo aapka raaz jaanta ho aur aapko emotional support de sake. Kya ye sambhav lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Studies ka bahana shayad kaam kar jaye. Papa padhai ko lekar hamesha supportive rahe hain. Par main unhe dhoke mein kab tak rakh paungi? Phir bhi, abhi ke liye thoda time mil jayega toh main thoda sukoon se soch paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding her through the immediate step of using studies as a buffer.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki aaj ek online course search karo jo aapke interest ka ho... phir kal Mummy aur Papa ko dikhao ki aap ye karna chahti ho... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke liye rishte dekh rahe hain
text: Theek hai. Main Masters ka koi course dekhungi. Unke liye rishte dekh rahe hain par agar main padhai ka zikr karoon toh shayad wo maan jayein ki abhi waqt sahi nahi hai. Kam se kam ye acting se toh behtar hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the need for 'buffer' strategies in high-pressure traditional families.
text: Family pressure mein aksar 'time-buying' strategies zaroori hoti hain taaki aap apne mental peace ke liye thodi jagah bana sakein. Ye dhoka nahi, survival hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Survival... haan, sahi kaha aapne. Mujhe lag raha tha main bahut buri beti hoon par shayad har koi aise hi raste nikaalta hai. Thoda bojh halka hua ye sun kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relief in finding a way to balance family and self.
text: Aapko thoda sukoon mila hai ye jaan kar ki parivaar ke saath rehte hue bhi aap apne liye jagah maang sakti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Main kal hi Papa se baat karungi. Padhai ke bahane wo rishte wale Sunday ko postpone kar dungi. Aaj raat thoda chain se so paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the immediate shift to a calmer state.
text: Itni lambi kashmakash ke baad, aaj aap thoda chain mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke liye rishte dekh rahe hain
text: Bohat zyada. Aapne mujhe sun liya, mere liye wahi kaafi tha. Wo mere liye rishte dekh rahe hain, par ab mere paas unhe handle karne ka ek plan hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror her role as a daughter who has found a strategy.
text: Ek beti ke farz aur apni zarurat ke beech aapne ek rasta nikaal liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Ab main jaati hoon. Course search karna hai. Phir se shukriya meri baatein sunne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her plan and reinforcing her worth regardless of the outcome.
text: Aapka ye kadam aapki apni himmat ka saboot hai. Padhai ke liye aapki lagan ko parivaar zaroor samjhega, aur ye aapki worth ko kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Umeed hai. Main poori koshish karungi. Goodbye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to acknowledge the end of the session with her new-found plan.
text: Naye irade ke saath aap is baatcheet ko yahan rok rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Phir kabhi baat karenge agar zaroorat padi toh. Khayal rakhiyega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final warm sign-off and validation of her support system.
text: Zaroor, hum humesha yahan hain. Aap apni himmat banaye rakhein, aapke irade bohot mazboot hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya. Bye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Short closing restatement.
text: Aapka din shubh ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas ab ja rahi hoon. Shukriya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final acknowledgment of her exit.
text: Apna khayal rakhein, namaste.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne pyaar aur haq ki baatein kabhi zubaan par nahi laati
text: Ghar ki dekhbhaal aur restricted mobility ki wajah se main uski shaadi mein nahi ja saki, aur ab Mummy ko lagta hai ki main bas ek 'sanskari beti' hoon jo ghar sambhal rahi hai. Agar maine apni LGBTQ identity reveal ki toh Papa samaj mein mooh dikhane layak nahi rahenge, isliye main unki har baat maanti hoon. Unka sar uncha rahe, bas isi liye main apne pyaar aur haq ki baatein kabhi zubaan par nahi laati.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational sacrifice of staying silent for her parents' pride.
text: Papa ki izzat bani rahe, isliye tumne apni feelings ko bilkul daba diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne pyaar aur haq ki baatein kabhi zubaan par nahi laati
text: Haan, kyunki agar maine kuch bhi kaha toh sab bikhar jayega. Main bas unke liye wahi 'sanskari beti' bani rehna chahti hoon jo sab ki sunte hai. Isliye apne pyaar aur haq ki baatein kabhi zubaan par nahi laati.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of the family structure collapsing if she speaks.
text: Tumhe lagta hai ki agar tumne sach bol diya, toh ghar ka poora mahaul kharab ho jayega aur Papa ka sir samaj mein jhuk jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Unhe lagta hai main ghar ki zimmedari utha rahi hoon, par unhe nahi pata ki main andar hi andar kitna ghutan mehsoos kar rahi hoon. LGBTQ word sunte hi pata nahi wo kya karenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the duration of carrying this secret while fulfilling household duties.
text: Itne waqt se tum ghar ki har duty nibha rahi ho aur ye itna bada raaz akele hi seh rahi ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne pyaar aur haq ki baatein kabhi zubaan par nahi laati
text: Pata nahi kab tak ye chalta rahega. Har din wahi darr rehta hai ki kahin unhe pata na chal jaye. Unka bharosa na toot jaye, bas isliye apne pyaar aur haq ki baatein kabhi zubaan par nahi laati.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question based on her mention of 'ghutan' to explore how she manages this silence.
text: Jab ye ghutan itni badh jati hai ki bardasht karna mushkil ho jaye, tab tum apna dil behlane ke liye kya karti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bas akele mein roti hoon ya purani photos dekhti hoon. Meri mobility bhi restricted hai toh main bahar ja kar kisi se mil bhi nahi sakti. Lagta hai jaise main apne hi ghar mein qaid hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the feeling of ISOLATION (C6 + Relational Preservation) and being trapped.
text: Lagta hai ki apni pehchaan chhupane aur ghar ki bandishon ki wajah se tum ek bahut gehre isolation mein phans gayi ho, jahan tum apni baat kisi se share bhi nahi kar sakti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne pyaar aur haq ki baatein kabhi zubaan par nahi laati
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Mummy ko lagta hai main unki madad kar rahi hoon, par unhe kya pata ki main bas majboori mein ye sab kar rahi hoon. Unke maan-samman ke liye main apne pyaar aur haq ki baatein kabhi zubaan par nahi laati.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feelings as normal in the context of Indian family dynamics regarding LGBTQ identity and pride.
text: Parivaar ki khushi ke liye apni feelings ko secondary rakhna humare yahan bahut common hai, aur tum jo kar rahi ho wo bahut bade dil ka kaam hai, par isme tumhara akela mehsoos karna bilkul natural hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kabhi kabhi gussa bhi aata hai, par phir Papa ka chehra yaad aa jata hai. Unhe heart ki problem hai, agar kuch ho gaya toh main khud ko kabhi maaf nahi kar paungi. Isliye main bas chup rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to acknowledge the relational anchor of her father's health hindering her disclosure.
text: Papa ki sehat ki fikr tumhe apne mann ki baat kehne se rok leti hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne pyaar aur haq ki baatein kabhi zubaan par nahi laati
text: Haan, bas yahi kashmakash chalti rehti hai. Unki 'sanskari beti' banne ke chakkar mein main apni life bhool rahi hoon. Bas unka sar uncha rahe, isliye apne pyaar aur haq ki baatein kabhi zubaan par nahi laati.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a systemic anecdote about LGBTQ youth in India balancing family pride and identity.
text: Ghar walon ki tabiyat aur samajik izzat ke beech phansna bahut logon ke saath hota hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul kar bolega nahi kyunki yahan 'pyaar' se zyada 'parivaar' ko priority di jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Par ab mujhe samajh nahi aa raha aage ka. Aise kab tak chalega? Kya koi raasta hai jis se main thoda sukoon paa sakun bina kisi ko dukh diye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggesting low-risk ways to find community or personal space without immediate disclosure.
text: Thoda sukoon paane ke liye hum kuch choti cheezein kar sakte hain jo kisi ko dukh nahi dengi. Ek raasta ye ho sakta hai ki tum online kisi safe LGBTQ support group se judo jahan tum anonymously apni baat keh sako. Doosra ye ki tum din mein 15 minute apne liye nikaalo jahan tum sirf wahi karo jo tumhe khushi de, chahe wo music sunna ho ya journal likhna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Online group wala idea acha hai, kam se kam wahan koi judge nahi karega. Par ghar mein sabko lagta hai main phone par bas kaam karti hoon. Batao kya karoon ki unhe shak na ho?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the steps of joining an online group safely.
text: Pehle ek safe aur private browser use karo... phir kisi trusted platform par anonymous profile banao... aur bas un logo se baat karo jo tumhari situation samajhte hon. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main koshish karungi. Shukriya meri baat sunne ke liye. Mujhe laga tha koi nahi samjhega ki ek beti par kya guzarti hai jab wo apne ghar walon se hi sach chhupati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the identity conflict as a systemic issue rather than a personal failure.
text: Apni identity ko chhupana koi dhokha nahi hai, balki ye ek survival strategy hai jab samaj aur parivaar humari sacchai ko accept karne ke liye taiyar na ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne bilkul sahi kaha. Ab thoda halka mehsoos ho raha hai. Shayad main dheere dheere apne liye thodi space bana paungi, bina ghar ki shanti bhang kiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the seeker's role of maintaining peace while finding personal space.
text: Ghar ki shanti ka dhyan rakhte hue bhi, tum apne liye ek chota sa sukoon ka rasta nikal rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas yahi umeed hai. Bas kabhi kabhi dar lagta hai ki ye anonymous profile bhi koi dekh na le. Par main dhyan rakhungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her caution and reassuring her that her efforts to protect herself are worthy.
text: Tumhara savdhan rehna bilkul sahi hai. Apne aap ko safe rakhna bhi ek bahut badi zimmedari hai jo tum nibha rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: True. Mummy se keh dungi ki office ka kaam online thoda badh gaya hai, toh wo shak nahi karengi. Wo toh bas khush rehti hain ki main ghar par hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the interaction with her mother and the role she plays.
text: Mummy ki khushi ka dhyan rakhte hue tum apne liye wo privacy dhoondh rahi ho jiski tumhe zaroorat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Right. Ab main thoda rest karti hoon. Aaj kafi baatein ho gayi aur mera dimaag thoda light feel kar raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the relief she feels after this conversation session.
text: Aaj itni baatein share karne ke baad jo halke-pan ka ehsaas ho raha hai, wo tumhare liye bahut zaroori tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: I really appreciate this. Thank you again. Hope main ye plans follow kar sakun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Encouraging her that taking it one step at a time is enough.
text: Dheere dheere hi sahi, tum apni taraf badh rahi ho, aur ye apne aap mein ek bahut badi jeet hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, jeet toh hai. Ab main jaati hoon, Mummy bula rahi hain chai ke liye. Unhe wahi purani beti dikhni chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror her immediate transition back to her familial role.
text: Apni beti ka farz nibhaate huye tum wapis ghar ke mahaul mein ja rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, bye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a warm closure and validating her strength in balancing her life.
text: Khayal rakhna apna, tumne aaj jo himmat dikhayi hai wo wakayi qabil-e-tareef hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bas yehi koshish karungi ki ye balance bana rahe. Agli baar jab baat karenge toh main bataungi ki online group kaisa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the timeline of her next steps.
text: Agli baar tumhare us naye experience ke baare mein sunne ka intezar rahega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zaroor. Take care.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final warm sign-off separating her worth from the family's outcome.
text: Aapka bhi khayal rahe, yaad rakhna ki tumhari khushi bhi utni hi mayne rakhti hai jitni parivaar ki shanti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghar mein koi kalesh nahi chahti
text: Ghar mein koi kalesh nahi chahti isliye caregiving mein itni thak gayi thi ki apni sabse achi dost ki shaadi miss ho gayi, par asli dard ye hai ki main kabhi apni partner ko 'bahu' banakar ghar nahi la paungi. Main shaadi ke pressure par hamesha muskura kar haan bol deti hoon. Khandaan ki maryada bachane ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai taaki meri parvarish par koi sawal na uthe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational sacrifice made for family peace and reputation.
text: Aap parivaar ki shanti aur khandaan ki izzat banaye rakhne ke liye apni sabse gehri sachai aur khushiyan sacrifice kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghar mein koi kalesh nahi chahti
text: Bilkul, kyunki main ghar mein koi kalesh nahi chahti. Mummy-Papa ne mujhe bohot mehnat se bada kiya hai, unki parvarish par log ungli uthayenge toh mujhse saha nahi jayega. Par jab bhi wo shaadi ki baat karte hain, mujhe apne partner ke liye itna guilt hota hai, like I am betraying everyone.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the recurring pressure and the duration of this internal conflict.
text: Yeh shaadi ka pressure aur guilt ka silsila aap kaafi waqt se har roz face kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, it's like a never-ending cycle. Caregiving mein din nikal jaata hai and nights are just full of these thoughts. Kabhi lagta hai ki shayad mujh mein hi kuch kharab hai, why can't I just be the 'normal' bahu they want? I feel like such a disappointment.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to stigma_cue with Lens E, softly naming the fear of being a disappointment.
text: Aapko darr lagta hai ki aapki asliyat aapke parents ki umeedon ko tod degi...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghar mein koi kalesh nahi chahti
text: Wahi toh darr hai. Log kya kahenge? Mere bhai ki shaadi mein koi issue na ho jaye. Bas isliye ghar mein koi kalesh nahi chahti aur chup chap sab manage karti hoon. But I am suffocating, you know? Partner se bhi jhoot bolna padta hai about why I can't introduce her.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the role of the 'protector' of family harmony.
text: Aap sabka dhyan rakhne aur rishton ko bachane ki zimmedari apne akele ke kandhon par uthaye hue hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zimmedari toh hai, par ab bohot bhaari lag rahi hai. Caregiving exhaust kar deti hai, then this double life. I love my family, but why does loving them mean I have to erase myself? It feels so unfair, but then I feel guilty for even thinking it's unfair.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question to explore the conflict between her love for family and her own identity.
text: Apne parivaar ke prati pyaar aur apni pehchaan ke beech jo yeh kashmakash hai, yeh aapko andar se kaise mehsoos karati hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghar mein koi kalesh nahi chahti
text: It makes me feel so lonely. Sabke beech hokar bhi, I am completely alone. I smile, I do the 'bahu' tasks they expect for the future, but deep down I know I'm living a lie just because ghar mein koi kalesh nahi chahti. I feel like a ghost in my own house.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the unexpressed emotion of ISOLATION common in C6 + Relational Preservation.
text: Lagta hai ki is maryada ko bachane ki koshish mein aap ek gehri ISOLATION mehsoos kar rahi hain, jahan aapka asli roop kisi ko dikhayi nahi deta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Isolation is the perfect word. I am hiding in plain sight. My partner keeps asking when we can be 'us' openly, and I have no answers. Main unhe 'bahu' banakar laana chahti hoon, but in reality, I am just a caregiving daughter who is too scared to speak up.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feelings as culturally normal for her context and separating worth from the secret.
text: Indian families mein apni identity aur tradition ke beech phanse rehna bohot se logon ki reality hai. Yeh samajhna zaroori hai ki aapki secret aapko bura insaan nahi banati, aap bas ek bohot hi complex situation handle kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghar mein koi kalesh nahi chahti
text: Thanks for saying that. It's just hard because ghar mein koi kalesh nahi chahti toh I keep burying it. Par kab tak? This double life is draining my energy. Caregiving and then this mental exhaustion, I feel like I'm hitting a wall.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote about the commonality of this struggle in the community.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghar mein koi kalesh nahi chahti

coping_shade_signal: ghar mein koi kalesh nahi chahti

coping_shade_signal: har din ek natak jee rahi hoon taaki rishton mein koi doori na aaye

coping_shade_signal: har din ek natak jee rahi hoon taaki rishton mein koi doori na aaye

text: Lagta hai is bheed bhare ghar aur in sab zimmedariyon ke beech, aap ek bahut gehri ISOLATION mehsus kar rahi hain jahan aapko koi sach mein dekhne wala nahi hai.

coping_shade_signal: har din ek natak jee rahi hoon taaki rishton mein koi doori na aaye

text: Unko bachane ke liye khud ko peeche rakhna aapke pyaar ki gehraayi ko dikhata hai; aapki value is thakan mein nahi, balki aapki is qurbani mein chhipe pyaar se hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Thank you. Mujhe sach mein ye sunne ki zaroorat thi ki main buri insaan nahi hoon. I've always felt like a villain in my own story.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a final systemic reframe to remove the villain narrative.
text: Ye 'villain' wali feeling system ki den hai, jahan parivaar ka maan itna fragile bana diya gaya hai ki ek individual ki sacchai usse tod de; ye system ki kami hai, aapki bilkul nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: I never thought of it like that. The system is flawed. I guess that takes a little bit of the weight off my shoulders.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the slight relief in processing the structural reality using Lens D.
text: Is naye nazariye se us bhari bojh ko ab thoda sa halka mehsoos karna shuru kiya hai apne...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: A little bit. It will take time. But I will definitely create that anonymous account tonight. I need some people who understand me.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about feelings regarding the upcoming micro-action.
text: In chote kadam ke baare mein soch kar ab kaisa lag raha hai jab raat ko ek naye safar ki shuruat hogi?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Thodi nervousness hai, par ek umeed bhi hai. At least wahan kisi ko izzat ki fikar nahi hogi. Wahan main bas 'main' rahungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Warm closing restatement focusing on the role-free space using Lens B.
text: Us naye online space mein aap sirf ek azaad insaan hongi, jahan na koi 'ideal beti' ka role nibhana hoga, aur na hi izzat bachane ki bhari zimmedari uthani padegi...
